<!--
DOC STRUCTURE RULES
- Exactly one H1 (#) heading at the top
- All other headings must be ## or deeper
- Do NOT hard-code section numbers
- Do NOT put title in YAML header (Quarto uses first H1)
-->
# Tags taxonomy — filesystem format (SPEC-0.0.8)

Hierarchical tags are stored under a configurable root (default `tags/`). The path separator is **`/`** (e.g. `programming/python/if`). See [SPEC-0.0.8-HIERARCHICAL-TAGS-AND-CANONICAL-FACTS.qmd](SPEC-0.0.8-HIERARCHICAL-TAGS-AND-CANONICAL-FACTS.qmd).

---

## Layout

- **Root:** `TAGS_ROOT` env or `tags/` under project root.
- **File:** `taxonomy.yaml` in the root.

---

## taxonomy.yaml

Single file containing the full taxonomy. Sync imports FS-only tags into the database; DB is source of truth for listing.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|--------------|
| `tags` | array | List of tag entries. |
| `updated_at` | string (optional) | ISO 8601. |

Each tag entry:

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|--------------|
| `id` | string (optional) | UUID; if omitted, one is generated on import. |
| `name` | string | Display name (e.g. `if`). |
| `parent_id` | string (optional) | UUID of parent tag; null for root. |
| `path` | string | Full path with `/` (e.g. `programming/python/if`). Must be unique. |

---

## Example

```yaml
tags:
  - name: programming
    path: programming
  - name: python
    parent_id: null
    path: programming/python
  - name: if
    path: programming/python/if
  - name: control-flow
    path: programming/python/control-flow
updated_at: "2025-03-12T12:00:00Z"
```

Questions and tutorials reference tags by **path** (e.g. `programming/python/if`).
